business.headline: Your bank knows when an investment plan isn't right. Why is it still sold?You trust your bank for financial advice and investments. But what if the person across the desk is under pressure to sell something else? In this article, we look at how sales targets shape what bank relationship managers recommend.

Let's set the record straight: Women are better at managing money than menThe financial world has long been seen as a man's playground. Yet from household budgets to investment portfolios, women are steadily proving that patience, discipline and long-term thinking, not risky bets, are often the real keys to managing money well.

Are bank lockers still the safest place for your valuables?Bank lockers are trusted to store gold and valuables, but recent cases have raised questions about safety. At the same time, getting a bank locker itself has become increasingly difficult, with waiting lists stretching months or even years in many cities.

Is buying a Rs 1 lakh iPhone on EMI a bad idea? Here's the math you should knowEasy EMI options offered by banks and online platforms have made it possible to buy these expensive devices with monthly payments that may appear manageable at first glance.

Domestic LPG price hiked by Rs 60, commercial cylinder up Rs 115 amid Iran warIndustry officials said the increase reflects a surge in global energy costs triggered by tensions and disruptions in West Asia, a region critical to global oil and gas supply chains.

Wall Street slides as weak jobs data, Middle East tensions rattle marketsthe Middle East conflict pushed up oil prices the most this week since Russia's 2022 invasion of Ukraine, bringing shipping through the strategic Strait of Hormuz to a halt.

Tariff refund system to be ready in 45 days: US customs agencyThe US Supreme Court had struck down Trump's tariffs, but did ⁠not say how the collected levies should be refunded, worrying small importers that the process would be prohibitively expensive and time-consuming.

Prachar Communications' Manyavar Mohey viral campaign crosses 300 million viewsThe campaign has already generated over 8 million organic likes and has crossed 100 million cumulative views on Instagram on the celebrity collaboration post within 72 hours, marking one of the largest celebrity-led moment marketing activations in India.

Brent Crude oil hits highest since April 2024 as Middle East conflict escalatesOil markets have seen a sharp rally this week. Brent Crude has climbed about 20%, while West Texas Intermediate (WTI) has surged roughly 25%.

Buying property in wife's or daughter's name? Save on stamp duty, loans and taxBuying a home is one of the biggest financial decisions many Indians make. But did you know that when a woman buys property in her own name, the purchase can come with added benefits such as lower stamp duty, cheaper home loans and useful tax deductions?

India holds sufficient crude stocks, no immediate fuel supply threat: Govt sourcesOfficials said India has sufficient stocks of petrol, diesel, LPG and natural gas. The government is closely monitoring the energy situation and reviewing it several times a day.

Sensex, Nifty end lower as Iran war lifts crude oil price; worst week in a yearThe S&P BSE Sensex fell 1,097 points to close at 78,918.90, while the NSE Nifty50 dropped 315.45 points to end the day at 24,450.45.

More women homebuyers now eye Rs 90 lakh to Rs 2.5 crore homes, says ANAROCKWomen are now choosing bigger homes, targeting premium price segments, and treating property as a long-term wealth-building asset, says data.

If crude oil hits $100 per barrel, here's what it would mean for IndiaIf crude oil surges past $100 per barrel, India could face a higher import bill, a weaker rupee and rising inflation, showing how distant geopolitical conflicts can quickly ripple into fuel prices and economic stability.

Mukesh Ambani leads India's richest, Gautam Adani second: Hurun Global Rich List 2026Mukesh Ambani continues to hold the title of India's richest person and also remains Asia's wealthiest individual. His total wealth rose by about 9% over the past year to reach Rs 9.8 lakh crore.

Investing in times of war: Panic, pause or buy the dip?Sensex and Nifty have seen declines as investors reacted to rising uncertainty, volatile crude oil prices and fears of a wider conflict. For many retail investors, this has meant seeing their mutual fund or stock market portfolios slip into the red.

Building businesses that last: 5 lessons for women entrepreneursAcross the country, millions of women are running businesses in their own way. Some operate small enterprises, others are building growing ventures, but each one contributes to livelihoods, job creation, and the strength of local economies.

Sensex down 1,100 points: Why is stock market falling today?The S&P BSE Sensex was down 566.31 points at 79,449.59, while the NSE Nifty50 fell 164.85 points to 24,601.05 as of 11:24 am. Sensex and Nifty shed over half a percent.

India asks refiners to maximise LPG output, sell only to IOC, BPCL and HPCLRefiners have been directed to increase LPG output and sell the fuel only to three state-run oil marketing companies, Indian Oil Corporation, Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited and Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited.

Gulf crisis disrupts LNG supply and your kitchen may feel the heatIf LNG supply disruptions persist, the impact may soon reach your kitchen, as higher global gas prices gradually filter into household gas bills and CNG costs across Indian cities.

entertainment.headline: No fear, all heart: Anushka, Sunny, Anil, others celebrate India's World Cup win Bollywood celebrities, including Anushka Sharma, Ajay Devgn and Anil Kapoor, celebrated India's historic T20 World Cup victory on social media. Their posts reflected national pride as Team India beat New Zealand.

After Trisha slams 'crude words' in cryptic post, Parthiban says sorry for remark Trisha Krishnan posted a cryptic response after comments made at an award ceremony drew attention online. Soon after her statement, actor-director R Parthiban apologised on social media.

T20 WC final: Aparshakti, Basil Joseph, Karan-Tejasswi cheer for India from stands Aparshakti Khurrana, Basil Joseph, Karan Kundrra, and Tejasswi Prakash were among several celebrities seen cheering for India at the ICC T20 World Cup final. The closing ceremony also saw performances by Ricky Martin, Sukhbir Singh, and Falguni Pathak.

Women's Day: Kangana, Kareena, Chiranjeevi, Ajay Devgn and others post wishes Chiranjeevi, Ajay Devgn, Kangana Ranaut, Kareena Kapoor, Hema Malini and Anupam Kher were among celebrities who posted on social media to commemorate International Women's Day on March 8.

Watch: Ricky Martin dances to Oh Ho Ho Ho at T20 WC final rehearsal, Sukhbir reacts A rehearsal video featuring Ricky Martin dancing to Sukhbir's evergreen song Oh Ho Ho Ho ahead of the ICC T20 World Cup 2026 final has captured fans' attention. Amid the social media buzz, the Indian singer has also reacted to the video.

Anurag Dobhal car crash: Aly Goni, Munawar Faruqui, Elvish Yadav and others react YouTuber Anurag Dobhal's car accident during an Instagram livestream has prompted strong responses from celebrities like Aly Goni, Munawar Faruqui, Elvish Yadav and Rajat Dalal. They addressed mental health, online trolling, and the responsibilities of social media influencers.

See Rashmika's response when Vijay said he's 'proud' of her award win Vijay Deverakonda congratulated Rashmika Mandanna after her Best Actress win at the Telangana Gaddar Film Awards 2025. Rashmika responded to her actor-husband with a heartfelt message.

Viral video: YouTuber Anurag Dobhal smiles from ICU after live-streamed car crash An early video to surface after Anurag Dobhal's car crash shows the YouTuber briefly smiling while lying in a hospital bed. Fellow social media influencer Yogesh Kathuria shared the video following a hospital visit after the accident.

Akansha Ranjan Kapoor marks Women's Day by revealing egg-freezing journey Actor Akansha Ranjan Kapoor revealed her decision to freeze her eggs on Women's Day. She celebrated women's strength through an honest social media post.

Explained: Why YouTuber Anurag Dobhal crashed his car during livestream The high-speed crash of YouTuber Anurag Dobhal, also known as UK 07 Rider, during a livestream has raised questions. Reports reveal what he said before the accident and the issues he claimed to face.

YouTuber Anurag Dobhal in ICU  after car crash on livestream YouTuber and Bigg Boss 17 contestant Anurag Dobhal, popularly known as UK 07 Rider is in ICU after a high-speed crash during a livestream watched by thousands.

Jr NTR's body double recalls why Allu Arjun's bouncers pushed him at ViRosh wedding A viral reception video from Rashmika Mandanna and Vijay Deverakonda's wedding showed Allu Arjun's security pushing Jr NTR's body double. Eshwar Harris has now explained what really happened.

Shahid Kapoor begins Farzi 2 shoot, shares pic with Raj and DK: Back at it again Shahid Kapoor has started filming Farzi 2 and shared a behind-the-scenes photo with creators Raj & DK. The update has sparked fresh buzz around the hit series.

Vijay Deverakonda reacts as little fan asks why she wasn't invited to his wedding Actor Vijay Deverakonda replied after a young fan asked why she wasn't invited to his wedding with Rashmika Mandanna. Here's what he said.

The rise of Virosh, and making of South's 1st power couple brand ft. Rashmika-Vijay What happens when love meets branding? We look at how Vijay Deverakonda and Rashmika Mandanna, popularly dubbed Virosh, may be shaping the South's first true celebrity power couple brand.

YouTuber Anurag Dobhal livestreams high-speed crash at 150 kmph on Instagram Reports circulating online have also sparked speculation about the circumstances surrounding the crash. Some social media users have suggested that the incident may have been linked to emotional distress, with claims that Dobhal had been dealing with family-related issues in recent days.

Watched Dhurandhar before I came to India: Finland President can't wait for sequel Finnish President Alexander Stubb shared that he watched Ranveer Singh's Dhurandhar before his official visit to India. The film, which has garnered international attention, is now gearing up for the release of its sequel on March 19.

Juggernaut loading: Dhurandhar 2 trailer earns praise from Alia, Vicky, Karan Johar The trailer for the highly anticipated sequel, Dhurandhar: The Revenge, was released on Saturday. It quickly drew widespread attention from Bollywood celebrities like Alia Bhatt, Vicky Kaushal and filmmaker Karan Johar, among others.

Vijay breaks silence on 'recent problems' amid cheating allegations, divorce row Actor and politician Thalapathy Vijay, speaking at a Women's Day event in Chennai, discussed recent issues surrounding him. He requested his supporters not to be troubled and emphasised the need to prioritise public welfare.

general news.headline: Indian among 2 killed as missile hits residential locality in Saudi Arabia Live Updates Two people, including an Indian national, were killed and 12 Bangladeshi residents injured after a projectile struck a residential compound in Al-Kharj, Saudi Arabia. Saudi Civil Defense said the incident caused casualties and property damage, while officials have yet to release the identities of the victims.

Well done, Team India: PM congratulates Men in Blue for T20 World Cup winIndia defended their T20 World Cup title with a 96-run triumph over New Zealand in Ahmedabad, posting a record 255/5 and powering past the Kiwis with strong batting and lethal bowling.

Fireballs, black skies, streets on fire: Hellish scenes in Tehran as oil sites hitVisuals showed huge fireballs and dense plumes of smoke rising above Tehran after strikes targeted key fuel infrastructure.

Watch: Arshdeep throws ball at Mitchell, warned after refusing to apologiseT20 World Cup final IND vs NZ: Arshdeep Singh hit Daryl Mitchell with a throw during the 11th over of the second innings but didn't apologise to the Kiwi batter, forcing umpires and the captain Suryakumar Yadav to intervene.

Drinking water latest target of Iran war: Rivals strike desalination plantsRecent attacks and allegations surrounding desalination facilities in the Gulf have revived fears that the Iran war could spill over into the Middle East's fragile water systems, triggering a humanitarian crisis. Not just oil, drinking water could be in the crosshairs too.

With Maheika by his side, Hardik wants to win 10 more trophiesIndia all-rounder Hardik Pandya is confident that he will win 5 or 6 more ICC trophies in his career. After the T20 World Cup win, Hardik thanked his partner, Maheika Sharma, stating that since she came into his life, he has been winning everything.

Live: Israel says it killed senior military aide of Iran Supreme Leader's officeUS-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: As the war in the Middle East rages for a ninth consecutive day, the Israeli military has warned it will target every successor of Supreme Leader Khamenei, killed in US-Israeli strikes on February 28. As hostilitied continued, Tehran was shrouded in smoke after Israeli airstrikes hit four oil storage facilities and a production transfer centre in Tehran and Alborz, killing four tanker drivers, with fuel spills igniting a "river of fire" along city streets. Explosions also struck Yazd, Tehran, and Isfahan, widening the conflict's impact. The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps claimed drone and missile strikes on Kuwait's Al-Adiri Airbase, destroying US helicopter repair centres, fuel tanks, and a command post. Also, US-Israeli jets hit workshops and a horse-riding club in Isfahan, killing 11. Earlier, the Israel Defense Forces said several Iranian F-14 jets and air defence systems at Isfahan Airport were destroyed, following previous strikes on IRGC-linked aircraft at Tehran's Mehrabad Airport. Stay tuned to IndiaToday.in for live updates.

Manipur woman, friend assaulted in Delhi after objecting to lewd remarksA peaceful evening walk near Saket District Court in Delhi turned violent when a young woman from Manipur was assaulted after objecting to inappropriate remarks.

No fear, all heart: Anushka, Sunny, Anil, others celebrate India's World Cup winBollywood celebrities, including Anushka Sharma, Ajay Devgn and Anil Kapoor, celebrated India's historic T20 World Cup victory on social media. Their posts reflected national pride as Team India beat New Zealand.

Indian-origin man may face deportation over viral dance video at WW2 Memorial in USIndian-origin man Madhu Raju deleted his social media accounts after a video of him dancing at the World War II Memorial in Washington DC went viral, triggering online backlash and scrutiny over possible immigration implications in the US.

After PM slams 'insult' to President, Mamata Banerjee retorts with 2024 photoPM Modi lashed out at the TMC government for "insulting" the President. In response, Mamata Banerjee showed photograph of the PM remaining seated while the President was standing.
Why promotions no longer motivate young workersPromotions used to mean you had arrived. For Gen Z, it could simply mean you stopped learning too soon.

After Trisha slams 'crude words' in cryptic post, Parthiban says sorry for remarkTrisha Krishnan posted a cryptic response after comments made at an award ceremony drew attention online. Soon after her statement, actor-director R Parthiban apologised on social media.

How Robotic Knee Replacement is Redefining the Journey Back to MobilityEarly consultation with an orthopaedic specialist is essential. Delaying surgery in severe cases can lead to worsening deformity and reduced functional outcomes.

Samson breaks Virat Kohli's record with 46-ball 89 in T20 World Cup finalIndian opener Sanju Samson registered the highest individual score by any player in a T20 World Cup final during the 2026 T20 World Cup title clash against New Zealand at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad on Sunday.

Modi a slave of dictator Trump: Congress chief on Russian oil waiver row, Iran warCongress chief Mallikarjun Kharge alleged that Prime Minister Narendra Modi was being "controlled" by US President Donald Trump using the Jeffrey Epstein case files.

Why Millennials and Gen Z are paying to travel with strangersHandcrafted ByOur Editors Community travel is taking off among young explorers, revealing something deeper than wanderlust. For a generation that has mastered doing everything alone, these trips offer stolen moments of connection. On crowded buses, over late-night hostel dinners, and through winding streets, where strangers become friends, and a sense of belonging quietly blooms, one shared adventure at a time.

Tehran burns as oil depots hit, Israel warns it will target next supreme leaderThe Iran war intensified as Israeli strikes set parts of Tehran ablaze after striking oil deports. President Masoud Pezeshkian warned Tehran could expand attacks on US targets as casualties rise and fears grow that the conflict could spread further across the Middle East with no clear end in sight.

Anthropic data reveals 22 career options that remain safe from AIA new study from Anthropic indicates that although AI tools are increasingly being used in workplaces, many professions still remain far from being automated. The research, which analysed usage patterns from the company's AI assistant Claude, points to a clear gap between the tasks AI is theoretically capable of performing and how frequently it is actually used in day-to-day jobs.

Trump considers ground operation in Iran to capture nuclear stockpile: ReportThe US and Israel have discussed the possibility of sending special forces into Iran at a later stage of the war to secure the country's stockpile of highly enriched uranium. Such an operation could involve troops entering heavily fortified underground facilities where the material is believed to be stored.

See Rashmika's response when Vijay said he's 'proud' of her award winVijay Deverakonda congratulated Rashmika Mandanna after her Best Actress win at the Telangana Gaddar Film Awards 2025. Rashmika responded to her actor-husband with a heartfelt message.

Delhi to hit 36 degrees on Monday, Himachal Pradesh on heat wave alertDelhi is set to touch 36 degrees Celsius on Monday as the IMD warns of heat waves across northwest India and incoming snow in Jammu and Kashmir.
I ditched UPI and switched to only cash for a week. Here's what happenedHandcrafted ByOur Editors Here are some key anecdotes from my week-long experiment of ditching UPI for cash.

Before Dena strike, Iran sailor told father US warned crew twice: ReportUS forces issued two warnings to abandon the Iranian warship IRIS Dena, a sailor aboard the ill-fated ship told his father, according to a report by Iran International.

sports.headline: Not accountable to social media, only to people in the changing room: Gautam Gambhir After India defended their T20 World Cup crown in Ahmedabad, head coach Gautam Gambhir said he is accountable only to the players and support staff in the dressing room, not to people on social media.

With Maheika by his side, Hardik wants to win 10 more trophies India all-rounder Hardik Pandya is confident that he will win 5 or 6 more ICC trophies in his career. After the T20 World Cup win, Hardik thanked his partner, Maheika Sharma, stating that since she came into his life, he has been winning everything.

Jasprit Bumrah delighted to bury Ahmedabad ghosts after T20 World Cup triumph T20 World Cup final, IND vs NZ: India fast bowler Jasprit Bumrah said that he was delighted to bury the ghosts of the ODI World Cup 2023 final after winning the T20 World Cup 2026 at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad.

T20 World Cup: Fans celebrate across the nation after India defend T20 crown Fans celebrated across the nation after the Indian team created history on Sunday, clinching an unprecedented third consecutive T20 World Cup title by demolishing New Zealand by 96 runs in the final in Ahmedabad. The Narendra Modi Stadium turned into a sea of blue as jubilant supporters watched India etch its name deeper into the history books with a dominant victory.

Named player of the tournament, Samson reveals he took help from Sachin Tendulkar T20 World Cup 2026, IND vs NZ Final: Named player of the tournament for three successive 80-plus scores, Sanju Samson revealed he leaned on guidance from Sachin Tendulkar. Samson smashed 89 off 46 balls in India's 96-run win over New Zealand in the final.

No match for explosive cricket played by India: Virat Kohli on T20 World Cup triumph Star India batter Virat Kohli congratulated team India for winning the T20 World Cup 2026, beating New Zealand by 96 runs in the final at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad.

India's historic Men's T20 World Cup title defence: In Stats T20 World Cup, IND vs NZ: India won their third title after beating New Zealand by 96 runs in the final on Sunday, March 8 at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad. The Men in Blue scored 255 for five after which they bowled the Kiwis out for 159 in 19 overs.

Ruthless India defeat history in Ahmedabad, defend T20 World Cup crown T20 World Cup, IND vs NZ final: India hammered New Zealand in a one-sided final, posting 255 and then defending it by 96 runs in Ahmedabad on Sunday, March 8. Sanju Samson's sensational 89 and Jasprit Bumrah's magical four-wicket haul ensured India became the first team to lift three men's T20 World Cup titles.

Gautam Gambhir silences critics, completes rare T20 World Cup player–coach double Gautam Gambhir completed a rare player–coach double in the T20 World Cup as India defeated New Zealand in the 2026 final at the Narendra Modi Stadium. Having been part of India's title-winning side in 2007, Gambhir has now lifted the trophy as head coach, answering critics who had questioned his aggressive tactics and bold selections.

Watch: Arshdeep throws ball at Mitchell, warned after refusing to apologise T20 World Cup final IND vs NZ: Arshdeep Singh hit Daryl Mitchell with a throw during the 11th over of the second innings but didn't apologise to the Kiwi batter, forcing umpires and the captain Suryakumar Yadav to intervene.

Gautam Gambhir a proud coach after Abhishek Sharma lights up Ahmedabad: See pic T20 World Cup final, IND vs NZ: Experts called on India to drop out-of-form Abhishek Sharma in the final. But, the team management persisted with him. The young left-hander responded with a 21-ball 52, which laid the foundation for India's 255-run total at Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad.

Stranded South African players allege England given priority for flight homeT20 World Cup: South Africa's Quinton de Kock and David Miller criticised the ICC for leaving their team stranded in India amid Gulf flight disruptions, questioning why England returned home first.

Samson breaks Virat Kohli's record with 46-ball 89 in T20 World Cup finalIndian opener Sanju Samson registered the highest individual score by any player in a T20 World Cup final during the 2026 T20 World Cup title clash against New Zealand at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad on Sunday.

Abhishek Sharma hits fastest fifty of T20 World Cup final, shuts criticsT20 World Cup, IND vs NZ: Abhishek Sharma shut his critics after hitting an 18-ball fifty in the final against Mitchell Santner's New Zealand on Sunday at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad.

Ravi Shastri's F1 themed toss introduction leaves Suryakumar in splitsT20 World Cup final: Ravi Shastri's rather unique toss introduction had India captain Suryakumar Yadav in splits on Sunday. Shastri, in his usual hilarious manner, introduced the two captains in Formula 1 style.

Suryakumar puts up brave face after losing crucial toss in T20 World Cup finalT20 World Cup, IND vs NZ: Indian captain Suryakumar Yadav lost the toss in the grand finale at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad as New Zealand opted to bowl first on Sunday, March 8.

Lin-vincible again as Lakshya Sen suffers All England heartbreak yet againLakshya Sen lost to his familiar foe Lin Chun-yi of Chinese Taipei in the All England Open final in Birmingham on Sunday. The 24-year-old suffered his second defeat in the final of the prestigious tournament, with his dream run ending in a straight-game loss.

T20 World Cup final: India field unchanged XI, team management backs VarunT20 World Cup Final: India have fielded an unchanged XI for the big final, backing out-of-form Abhishek Sharma and under-pressure Varun Chakravarthy. New Zealand, meanwhile, won the toss and opted to field.

Bangladesh eye new start in Pakistan ODIs after T20 World Cup embarrassmentBAN vs PAK: Bangladesh's Najmul Hossain Shanto said the team aims for a fresh start against Pakistan and will focus on qualifying for the 2027 ODI World Cup. The Tigers skipped the T20 World Cup, boycotting the tournament due to security concerns over playing in India.

My perfect innings: Prithvi Shaw announces engagement with girlfriend Akriti AgarwalIndian batter Prithvi Shaw announced his engagement to social media influencer Akriti Agarwal, sharing romantic photos on Instagram that went viral. The couple were recently seen together at Arjun Tendulkar and Saaniya Chandhok's wedding.

After happy farewell, Alyssa Healy bids for India vs Australia Women's T20 WC finalINDW vs AUSW: Alyssa Healy expressed her hope to see India and Australia clash in the Women's T20 World Cup final later this year in England. On Sunday, she led Australia to a 10-wicket victory in the Perth Test, marking her farewell match for the Aussies.

New Zealand cricketer creates history, picks up five wickets in five ballsBrett Randell delivered a historic performance in the Plunkett Shield, taking six wickets in eight balls for Central Districts and finishing with 7 for 25, as Northern Districts collapsed to 82 all out and were forced to follow on.

Mohammad Amir keeps vouching against India, predicts New Zealand to win T20 World CupT20 World Cup Final, IND vs NZ: Mohammad Amir said that if New Zealand avoid the mistakes England made in the semifinals, they have every chance of beating India in the final at the Wankhede Stadium in Mumbai.

Here to fight: Lindblad makes bold statement after impressive debut at Australian GPArvid Lindblad scored points on his Formula One debut at the Australian Grand Prix, finishing eighth for Racing Bulls after a battle with Max Verstappen at Albert Park.

Harmanpreet's birthday blues as India Women endure humiliating Perth Test defeatINDW vs AUSW: Harmanpreet Kaur celebrated her 37th birthday on Sunday, but India slumped to a 10-wicket win in the Day-Night Test at the WACA in Perth. The Aussies also won the multi-format series 12-8.

T20 World Cup final, IND vs NZ: 5 New Zealand players who India should be wary ofT20 World Cup Final: New Zealand are set to feature in their first T20 World Cup final since 2021. Here are five players that India should be wary of in the summit clash at the Narendra Modi Stadium.

Novak Djokovic not planning on retiring anytime soon, sets sights on LA 2028 OlympicsNovak Djokovic says defending his Olympic gold medal at the 2028 Los Angeles Games is one of his long-term goals, even though he will be 41 years old when the Games get underway.

IND vs NZ: Rohit Sharma explains reason behind his viral pep-talk to SamsonT20 World Cup final: Rohit Sharma explained the reason why he decided to give a pep-talk to Sanju Samson at the start of the T20 World Cup. Samson completed a sensational turnaround and guided India to the final of the T20 World Cup 2026.

India favourites for T20 World Cup final, but how much is enough to seal the title?T20 World Cup, IND vs NZ: Suryakumar Yadav's side will enter the final against New Zealand as favourites, with an opportunity to become the first team in the tournament history to successfully defend the title.

F1 2026: George Russell wins Australian GP as Ferrari fumble advantageGeorge Russell and Mercedes laid down the marker early in the F1 2026 season as the British driver won the Australian Grand Prix on Sunday, March 8. Ferrari were left to rue fumbling their early advantage as Kimi Antonelli completed a Mercedes 1-2 at the top.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
